description: Browse, search, and download declassified UAP files from the War.gov PURSUE archive

tools.name: agencies_list
tools.description: List every government agency that contributed files to the PURSUE archive, with per-agency file counts and a breakdown by file type.

tools.name: files_get
tools.description: Get details of a specific file. Required: id.

tools.name: files_list
tools.description: List all declassified UAP files. Optional: agency, type, location (plus 3 more).

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by file type (PDF, VID, IMG)

params.name: after
params.description: Show files with incident dates after this date

params.name: before
params.description: Show files with incident dates before this date

tools.name: files_search
tools.description: Full-text search across file titles, descriptions, and locations. Required: q.
